name: hhq
description: Helper HQ — a family of AI-assisted helpers for solo founders, coaches, and consultants. V1 ships Sales Helper (prospect ranking + opener drafting from your LinkedIn network) plus Marketing Helper (deep ICP discovery and offer review walkthroughs). Open a chat, ask for the next 5 prospects, and get short tailored opening messages drafted from real signals — LinkedIn posts, recent activity, role changes. Human-in-the-loop by design — the plugin prepares, you review and send. V1 dogfood ships with all helpers active for every activated user.
